name: Agreni Batra
tagline: Education researcher, curriculum designer, and STEM educator at Teachers College, Columbia.
bio:
I work at the intersection of curriculum design, teacher development, and equitable STEM education. I'm currently a graduate student at Teachers College, Columbia University, where my research focuses on contextual, empowering learning environments and the systemic factors that shape educational access.

My practice spans classroom teaching, curriculum design, and teacher preparation — including five years teaching grades 6–8 in Delhi through Teach For India, and ongoing work with Girls Inc. NYC on youth STEM programming.

I'm interested in the gap between what curricula promise and what students actually experience, and in how teacher preparation shapes that gap.

If you're working on curriculum design, teacher development, or equitable learning environments, I'd love to connect.
